title: Pulse Selection Visualization enhancement
excerpt: We have several massive boards that have a couple hundred pulses and would love it if once I select a pulse/multiple pulses, the back light of the pulse become stronger so that I know what pulse(s) have been selected. Cu…

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have several massive boards that have a couple hundred pulses and would love it if once I select a pulse/multiple pulses, the back light of the pulse become stronger so that I know what pulse(s) have been selected. Currently as far as I can tell, there is no back light color that changes when you select the pulse(s). Just a visual enhancement that I think (hope) all would appreciate

image.png1643×181 39.7 KB

posts.author: Galit-monday.com (Galit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for this feedback @alejencia! I can certainly see where you’re coming from and will share this with our design team!

Best,
Galit

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Galit-monday.com - Hi!

Boards are getting bigger and badder

Any chance of an update on this? very hard on the eye to FOLLOW that row … just asking for some lovely highlight color when the pulse is selected, that’s all

image.png1530×764 99.7 KB

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml: Been a while since I last checked on this and was wondering if this was on the list to add. Seems relatively easy to add. would be great to have. Thanks all!

posts.author: johan.n (Johan)
posts.cookedHtml:
This would be highly appreciated. Very difficult to follow a row all the way to the other side on a superwide screen.
I’d like the highlight already on “on hover” and not only when selected.
